Position

Business Analyst – CRM Implementation

Experience: 5+ Years Location: Hybrid/Onsite (Based on Business Requirement) Employment Type: Full-Time

Job Summary

We are seeking an experienced Business Analyst – CRM Implementation with 5+ years of experience in gathering business requirements, analyzing business processes, and delivering successful CRM implementation projects. The ideal candidate will work closely with business stakeholders, product teams, developers, QA teams, and customers to translate business requirements into functional solutions while ensuring successful CRM adoption.

Key Responsibilities

  1. Gather, analyze, and document business requirements through stakeholder meetings, workshops, and interviews.
  2. Prepare Business Requirement Documents (BRD), Functional Requirement Documents (FRD), user stories, acceptance criteria, and process documentation.
  3. Conduct gap analysis and recommend CRM‑based solutions aligned with business objectives.
  4. Design current‑state and future‑state business process flows.
  5. Collaborate with Product, Development, QA, and Support teams throughout the Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC).
  6. Coordinate CRM implementation projects from requirement gathering through deployment and post‑production support.
  7. Facilitate Agile ceremonies including backlog grooming, sprint planning, and requirement clarification.
  8. Coordinate User Acceptance Testing (UAT), defect tracking, and production validation.
  9. Support CRM workflow configuration, business process automation, and system enhancements.
  10. Work with third‑party integrations including APIs, telephony systems, SMS gateways, email platforms, and other enterprise applications.
  11. Provide post‑implementation support and ensure smooth user adoption.
  12. Maintain project documentation and ensure compliance with delivery standards.
  13. Collaborate with cross‑functional teams to improve business processes and customer experience.

Required Skills

  • Minimum 5+ years of Business Analysis experience.
  • Hands‑on experience in CRM Implementation Projects (LeadSquared, Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics 365, SugarCRM, Zoho CRM, HubSpot, Freshworks CRM, or similar).
  • Strong knowledge of requirement elicitation, gap analysis, and business process mapping.
  • Experience preparing BRD, FRD, user stories, use cases, and acceptance criteria.
  • Good understanding of Agile (Scrum) and Waterfall methodologies.
  • Experience in UAT planning, execution, and production support.
  • Strong stakeholder management and communication skills.
  • Basic knowledge of SQL and REST APIs (preferred).
  • Familiarity with workflow automation and CRM integrations.
  • Proficiency with documentation and process‑mapping tools such as Draw.io, BizAgi, Balsamiq, Lucidchart, Visio, or similar.
  • Excellent analytical, problem‑solving, and presentation skills.

Preferred Qualifications

  • Experience in SaaS product implementation.
  • Exposure to CRM customization and workflow automation.
  • Experience working with enterprise clients across multiple domains.
  • Knowledge of AI‑powered productivity tools (ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot, etc.) is an added advantage.
  • Experience in customer onboarding and change management.

Education

Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, or a related field.

Preferred Domain Experience

  • CRM Implementation
  • SaaS Products
  • Sales Automation
  • Customer Engagement Platforms
  • Healthcare, Education, Real Estate, Financial Services, Enterprise Applications

If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at mitty.j@difinitydigital.com.

Company

Location

Kochi

Job Summary

  • Measure metrics such as website traffic, engagement, lead generation, and conversions.
  • Optimize strategies based on insights and market trends.
  • Collaborate with the SEO team to improve visibility and organic search performance.

  • Coordinate with Marketing, Sales, Product, Design, and Development teams for integrated campaigns.
  • Support product launches, webinars, and other initiatives through compelling content.
  • Stay updated on emerging content marketing trends and best practices.

Qualifications & Skills

  • Any Bachelor's Degree.
  • 3–5 years of experience in B2B Content Marketing or Content Strategy.
  • Excellent writing, editing, proofreading, and storytelling skills.
  • Experience creating content for websites, blogs, social media, email campaigns, and sales enablement.
  • Strong understanding of B2B sales cycles, buyer personas, lead generation, and funnel marketing.
  • Ability to translate complex technical concepts into engaging business content.
  • Familiarity with CMS platforms, SEO best practices, Google Analytics, and social media management tools.
  • Strong analytical, organizational, and project management abilities.
  • Excellent communication, collaboration, and interpersonal skills.

Preferred Candidate

  • Proven track record of developing content strategies that drive measurable business results.
  • Experience in SaaS, software, technology, or other B2B organizations.
  • Knowledge of SEO content writing, keyword optimization, and performance analysis.
  • Self‑driven with strong ownership, creativity, and attention to detail.
  • Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines in a fast‑paced environment.

How to Apply

Interested candidates may submit their resume to recruitment@nesasoftware.com. For more details, call or WhatsApp 81296 88772. Subject Line: Application for Content Marketer. If this opportunity aligns with your career goals, kindly share your updated resume with us at atrecruitment@nesasoftware.com.

iBoson Innovations (P) Ltd
ACE 1, 3rd Floor, CDAC Building, Technopark Campus, Kazhakootam, Thiruvananthapuram, 695581
http://www.iboson.io

Role

SaaS - Product Marketing Specialist
Closing Date: 26 July 2026
Job Published: 20 July 2026
Contact Email: career@ibosoninnov.com

Brief Description

We are looking for a strategic and creative Product Marketing Specialist to own the positioning, messaging, and go‑to‑market execution for our SaaS product. The ideal candidate will bridge the gap between Product, Sales, and Marketing — translating product capabilities into compelling stories that drive awareness, adoption, and revenue.

Key Responsibilities

  • Develop and execute go‑to‑market strategies for new product launches, features, and updates.
  • Craft clear, compelling product messaging, positioning, and value propositions for target segments.
  • Conduct market research, competitive analysis, and buyer persona development to inform strategy.
  • Partner with Product Management to understand the roadmap and translate features into customer benefits.
  • Create and maintain sales enablement content — battlecards, one‑pagers, case studies, FAQs, and demo scripts.
  • Collaborate with Sales, Pre‑Sales, and Customer Success teams to align messaging and support deal cycles.
  • Plan and execute integrated launch campaigns across web, email, social, and paid channels.
  • Produce content such as website copy, blogs, whitepapers, videos, and presentations that support the funnel.
  • Track, analyze, and report on campaign performance, launch adoption, and content effectiveness.
  • Monitor industry trends, competitor activity, and customer feedback to continuously refine positioning.

Preferred Skills & Requirements

  • Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or related field; MBA is a plus.
  • 2–5 years of experience in Product Marketing, preferably within a SaaS or B2B technology company.
  • Strong writing, storytelling, and content creation skills across formats and channels.
  • Experience conducting market research, competitive analysis, and buyer persona development.
  • Proficiency with marketing and analytics tools (HubSpot, Google Analytics, Semrush, or similar).
  • Solid understanding of SaaS business models, subscription metrics, and go‑to‑market strategy.
  • Excellent cross‑functional collaboration skills, working closely with Product, Sales, and Design.
  • Strong presentation and verbal communication skills, comfortable presenting to internal stakeholders.
  • Data‑driven mindset with ability to measure and report on campaign and launch success.
  • Experience creating sales enablement material or supporting a Sales team is an advantage.

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

  • Product launch adoption and time‑to‑market
  • Sales enablement content usage and effectiveness
  • Website and campaign traffic, engagement, and conversion metrics
  • Content output and engagement (blogs, videos, collateral)
  • Win/loss rate improvement driven by positioning and messaging
  • Marketing‑sourced pipeline contribution

Application

Interested candidates are invited to send their resume and a brief cover letter outlining their relevant experience to career@ibosoninnov.com.
summary: Strategic Product Marketing Specialist needed to drive SaaS product positioning, messaging, and go‑to‑market execution. Must have 2‑5 years experience in SaaS marketing.
